zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie於1330年出生在蘇格蘭培爾斯特盧阿時，他的父親Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol40歲，母親Margaret Lennox35歲。他於大約1347年與Jean Fordell de Atholia在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1392年在英國蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie于1330年出生在苏格兰培爾斯特盧阿时，他的父亲Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol40岁，母亲Margaret Lennox35岁。他于大约1347年与Jean Fordell de Atholia在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1392年在英国苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie was born in 1330, in Struan, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Lennox, was 35. He married Jean Fordell de Atholia about 1347, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1346. He died in 1392, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.Glenerochie, Rannoch, Scotland: Rannoch, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie est né en 1330, à Struan, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lennox, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Jean Fordell de Atholia environ 1347, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé en 1392, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.Glenerochie, Rannoch, Scotland: Rannoch, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie 1330 in Struan, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Lennox 35. Er hat um 1347 in Schottland, United Kingdom Jean Fordell de Atholia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cromartyshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie è nato il nel 1330 nel Struan, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lennox, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Jean Fordell de Atholia circa 1347, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì nel 1392, nel Cromartyshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochieが1330年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアストルアンで生まれた時，父Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Atholは40歳，母Margaret Lennoxは35歳であった。約1347年にイギリススコットランドでJean Fordell de Atholiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1392年にイギリススコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.Glenerochie, Rannoch, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 랜옥h
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 스트루아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lennox(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1347년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Jean Fordell de Atholia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1392년 영국 스코틀랜드 크로마티실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Glenerochie, Rannoch, Scotland: Rannoch, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie nasceu em 1330, em Struan, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lennox, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Fordell de Atholia aproximadamente 1347, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 1392, em Cromartyshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.Glenerochie, Rannoch, Scotland: раннох, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie родился в 1330 г. в местности струань, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lennox, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Fordell de Atholia около 1347 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Jean Fordell de Atholia aproximadamente 1347, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió en 1392, en Cromartyshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
